message:
fix: preserve Docker image cache between eval runs

Harbor's default --delete flag runs `docker compose down --rmi all`
which removes all images including base layers (python:3.13-slim,
ubuntu:24.04). This forces re-pulls on every run, hitting Docker Hub
rate limits at high concurrency.

Adding --no-delete keeps images cached while still removing containers.
Base images are pulled once and reused across runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -95,6 +95,7 @@ def build_harbor_command(
         f"-n {concurrency}",
         f"--job-name {job_name}",
         f"--jobs-dir /tmp/{job_name}",
+        "--no-delete",
     ])
     for ak in (ak_args or []):
         parts.append(f"--ak {ak}")
